title: senegalia gilliesii
intro: Senegalia gilliesii, also known as the Bushman's poison or Bushman's poison tree, is a species of thorny tree in the pea family Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Senegalia gilliesii include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a purgative. Herbal preparations of Senegalia gilliesii include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
